### Review checklist

- [ ] Spot-check a few generated reference docs under `.agent/skills/brahe/references/` for formatting issues (fenced code blocks, admonitions, tables).
- [ ] Verify that `.agent/skills/brahe/SKILL.md` links are valid and the module map is up-to-date.

> **Note:** Do not manually edit the generated files in `.agent/skills/brahe/` on this branch. Instead, update `scripts/generate_brahe_skill.py` or `scripts/BRAHE_SKILL.md` on `main` and re-run the sync workflow.
